description:
Log in to FreeScout (admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123!) and add an internal note to the conversation 'VPN connection drops intermittently from Building C' from customer Marcus Rivera in the 'Network Support' mailbox. Do NOT send a reply to the customer. The note must include the following troubleshooting details:

Troubleshooting performed so far:
1. Verified VPN concentrator logs - no hardware errors detected
2. Ran continuous ping test to gateway 10.0.3.1 - packet loss of 12% observed
3. Checked switch port Gi1/0/24 - found CRC errors incrementing
4. Suspect faulty patch cable between IDF-C and MDF
Next steps: Schedule cable replacement during maintenance window Saturday 2am-4am

metadata.target_subject: VPN connection drops intermittently from Building C
